name: Multiple machines involved in my work accident, who pays?
description: Employer comp + third-party suits against others.

mainEntity.name: Multiple machines involved in my work accident, who pays?

acceptedAnswer.text: Employer comp + third-party suits against others.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp first from employer; third-party claims against faulty parties.** Coordinate claims[2][4]. Manufacturers, suppliers liable. Attorney apportions fault.
